title: selaginella moritziana var. moritziana
intro: Selaginella moritziana var. moritziana, also known as 'Misty fern', is a species of spore-producing vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella moritziana var. moritziana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially helping to manage diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, tincture, or powder, and is also incorporated into traditional remedies for its perceived health benefits.
